name: Security Training
briefing: Welcome to Security Training. Practice commanding marine squads, controlling ship access points, and responding to a simulated boarding scenario. Intruders move between rooms — cut them off and eliminate them.

nodes.text: Orient yourself — review squad positions on the ship interior map
nodes.hint: The Security panel shows the ship interior as a grid of rooms. Your marine squads appear as blue icons. Each room shows how many crew and intruders are present. Doors can be sealed to restrict movement.

nodes.text: Move a squad to an adjacent room
nodes.hint: Click a squad to select it, then click an adjacent room to move it there. Squads can only move through unsealed doors. Moving into a room with intruders starts combat automatically. Move your squad toward the centre corridor.

nodes.text: Seal a door to control access
nodes.hint: Click on a doorway between two rooms and select SEAL. Sealed doors block all movement — including your own squads. Use seals to funnel intruders toward your marines. You can unseal at any time.

Keep your squads deployed and doors configured. In a real boarding, intruders appear at breach points and move toward vital systems. The Captain may request you lock down specific decks — always confirm before sealing Engineering or Medical.
